title: DoIT Repair - Departmental Repairs or Referrals for Personal Repairs
body: DoIT Repair is ending in-shop hardware repair. The following is what to expect for both personal and departmental machines. Personal Machines We provide remote onsite, phones, chat, and email support. Onsite will still perform triage and troubleshooting services. Software repairs (format re-installs, virus removal, etc) are still being offered and the machine can be checked into Repair at the onsite Help Desk. For personal device hardware repairs please see the following list of local computer repair vendors. For most up to date hours and locations, please visit the business' website. This is a list of repair shops that we found in the Madison area. There may be others that we missed. This list is for convenience purposes only and not an endorsement:] Apple Store Hilldale location phone number: 608-827-9840 and website: https://www.apple.com/retail/hilldale/ Multiple locations, Apple products only Graphite*** (Trusted University Partner, Apple) graphiteas.com/ 608-838-6650 Multiple locations Apple products only Tech Heroes 608-620-4564 madisontechheroes@gmail.com Multiple locations REMACHINES remachines.com , 608-205-8668 Rocket Repair wisconsinrepair.com , 608-819-6104 Departmental Machines If you are on campus you can submit a departmental repair request here: Departmental Repair Service Request Form Computers (Dell or Apple only) in need of hardware services can be checked in at the onsite Help Desk and will be serviced by one of our contracted vendors: Dell machines (Vanguard) Apple machines (Vanguard) Vendors can perform warranty repairs for official Dell or Apple warranties If there is a cost for the repair, Vanguard will reach out to the person who checked in the computer for cost/repair approval and payment unless otherwise stated at the time of check-in. There is usually a minimum cost for initial diagnostics for any out of warranty hardware repair: Vanguard: $65 diagnostic, goes towards first hour of labor Refer to Shipping to the DoIT Help Desk - Computer Repair and Loaner Equipment if you would like to ship a computer to us from a location that is not on campus. DoIT will not cover shipping fees or insurance and not liable for any damages or lost/stolen packages during transit. See Also Shipping to the DoIT Help Desk - Computer Repair and Loaner Equipment Get Help from DoIT
